name: Oriole Resources PLC
summary: Oriole Resources PLC, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration and development of gold and other base metals in Turkey, East Africa, and West Africa. It primarily holds 85% interest in the Senala project covering an area of 472.5 km2 situated in Senegal; and 90% interest in the Bibemi and Wapouz√É¬© projects located in Cameroon. The company was formerly known as Stratex International Plc and changed its name to Oriole Resources PLC in September 2018. Oriole Resources PLC was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
